---
title: About
---
# Steph Stammel, Ph.D.

Lone wolf econometrician. Rugged, clever, indefatigable on the chase and liable to howl loudly at inconvenient moments.

__A little about myself:__

Back at the turn of the century when I left school for university, I swore I'd never study math again.

And here we are.

If you want to know about my career and professional life, [you can check out my LinkedIn bio](https://www.linkedin.com/in/steph-stammel-phd-93b18444/).
